# VERIFY: #181 — Create ux-review recipe
<!-- Generated by start-feature-planning | Plan sub-agent output -->

**Intent:** Verify the ux-review recipe correctly audits UX, proposes design, and generates implementable epics

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Recipe captures screenshots of all in-scope feature scenarios at desktop (1280x800) and mobile (375x812) viewports
- [ ] axe-core accessibility audit runs on every captured page and produces JSON reports with WCAG violation counts
- [ ] UX audit report references actual screenshot paths and measured accessibility scores (not narrative descriptions)
- [ ] Design system proposal is grounded in observed visual state from screenshots (colors, typography, spacing extracted from actual pages)
- [ ] Design system proposal incorporates PP-2 and QP-6 levels from product.yaml when available
- [ ] Human checkpoint presents reviewable HTML brief with screenshot gallery, accessibility findings, and design system options
- [ ] User can Tether (approve), Orbit (revise), or Vanish (halt) at checkpoint
- [ ] After Tether, recipe produces design-epics.yaml with at least one epic per identified UX issue
- [ ] Each design epic conforms to features.yaml schema and can be consumed by prepare-implementation
- [ ] Each design epic references specific screenshots, accessibility violations, and CSS/component changes
- [ ] Image generation skill accepts prompt and returns image path without vendor-specific code
- [ ] Evidence self-committed via repo-orchestrator per ADR 012
- [ ] Recipe resumes from last completed step if interrupted (status file)
- [ ] Recipe halts gracefully if no deployed URL is accessible
- [ ] Recipe halts gracefully if Playwright cannot be initialized

## Verification Steps

| Step | Method | Expected Outcome |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Run `/ux-review --epic E1 --url http://localhost:3000` | Recipe starts, pre-flight passes |
| 2 | Check screenshot directory | PNG files named `{feature}-{behavior}-{viewport}.png` |
| 3 | Check accessibility directory | Per-page axe-core JSON with `violations[]`, `passes[]` |
| 4 | Read ux-audit-report.yaml | `screens[].screenshot_path` and `screens[].accessibility.violation_count` present |
| 5 | Read design-system-proposal.yaml | `tokens.colors[]`, `tokens.typography[]`, `tokens.spacing[]` extracted from screenshots |
| 6 | Open ux-review-brief.html | Screenshot gallery, a11y table, design system options render correctly |
| 7 | Respond `Tether` at checkpoint | Recipe proceeds to execution phase |
| 8 | Check design-epics.yaml exists | File present with `status: DRAFT` |
| 9 | Validate design epic schema | Each epic has `id`, `name`, `success_scenarios`, `failure_conditions`, `behaviors` |
| 10 | Check design epic references | Each epic has `screenshot_refs` and `accessibility_refs` |
| 11 | Feed to prepare-implementation | `/prepare-implementation --epic DE1` accepts the epic |
| 12 | Check image gen abstraction | `config.provider` is a string, no vendor imports |
| 13 | Verify evidence commit | repo-orchestrator commits evidence files |
| 14 | Kill mid-execution, restart | Resume from last completed step |

## Edge Cases

| Scenario | Expected Behavior |
|----------|------------------|
| No deployed URL accessible | Hard halt: "No accessible URL. Provide --url or start dev server." |
| Playwright not installed | Offer to install; halt if declined |
| features.yaml has no behavioral scenarios | Halt: "No scenarios to audit." |
| product.yaml missing (no PP-2/QP-6) | Proceed with baseline defaults; note in report |
| All accessibility checks pass | Report "No violations"; design epics focus on visual only |
| User responds Vanish | Halt cleanly, commit analysis evidence |
| User responds Orbit with preferences | Re-invoke design system proposal with preferences; re-present checkpoint (max 2 cycles) |
| Screenshot capture fails for one scenario | Log error, continue with remaining; note gap in report |
| Image generation provider unavailable | Proceed without inspirations; note gap in evidence |
| Zero UX issues found (everything looks good) | Produce "clean bill of health" report; no design-epics.yaml created |
